name: 📦 Dashboard Infrastructure — pages, groups, theme (no wires needed)
info: These nodes define the Dashboard 2 UI structure. Edit here to rename pages or change layout.

name: ⚙ CONFIGURE ME (read-only reference)
📡 TLE Data Fetch & Cache
info:
Fetches Starlink GP elements from Celestrak every 2 hours.
• Skips HTTP if local cache is < 2h old (Check Cache Age node)
• On HTTP error, falls back to cached file (Load Cache Fallback)
• On success, saves CSV and pre-parses it into global.parsedSats[]
• Cache path: /data/starlink_tle_cache.csv — change in the 3 fs nodes

name: Check Cache Age
HTTP OK?
Save & Store TLE
Load Cache Fallback
🔄 2-Second Animation Loop
info:
Propagates all Starlink satellite positions to the current time every 2 seconds.
• Gated by viewer count — pauses when no Dashboard clients are connected (saves CPU)
• Reads pre-parsed global.parsedSats[] set by the TLE fetch pipeline
• Outputs to 4 link-out nodes → 4 link-in nodes in the Templates column
• 4th output carries AOS/LOS notification strings for favorited satellites

name: Viewer Gate
Compute Satellite Positions
👥 Client Viewer Tracking
info:
Counts connected Dashboard 2 browser clients.
• Viewer Gate (Row 2) passes messages only when viewerCount > 0
• Eliminates wasteful 2s compute cycles when nobody is watching

name: Track Viewer Count
⚙ Settings & Event Routing
info:
Receives events from all UI templates via a shared link-in:
  topic='observer'   → saves lat/lon to flow context (file store)
  topic='filter'     → saves minElevation / activeShells / maxSats
  topic='select'     → stores selected satellite name
  topic='favorites'  → saves AOS/LOS watch list
Pass Prediction: send msg.payload = 'STARLINK-XXXX' to the pass fn
to get upcoming passes over the next 6 hours.

name: Apply Settings
Predict Passes (on-demand)
📊 UI Templates  (Dashboard 2 Vue components)
info:
Each template:
  ← receives satellite payload via link-in from Compute pipeline
  → sends user events (select / filter / observer) via link-out → Settings handler

SVG Radar:    /starlink/svg-radar    — Vue SVG, elevation rings, click-to-select
Canvas Radar: /starlink/canvas-radar — HTML5 Canvas, same layout, onClick hit-test
Ground Track: /starlink/ground-track — Leaflet map, circleMarker, antimeridian-safe
Alerts:       sidebar on SVG page    — AOS/LOS notification banners (auto-dismiss 15s)
Settings:     /starlink/settings     — Observer location, favorites, AOS threshold
